sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hahkat pawlpi, gamla nai pan, thu sin dingin, i kikhawm hi;
Tawpna a nuam, a omnate, I gen ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hahkat pawlpite aw, Topa kiang kikhawm ni;
Topa le a gampi, adingin hahkat ni;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khazih Topa, phat dingin ah, la sa dingin, hong kikhawm
Khangnote in, hih mun panin, hin tawntungna ngah ding uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: dingin, kiciamna pha, a thak koih hi;
Vantung inn nuam, tun ma tengin, upna behlapin nasem ni.
